ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "region_type" TEXT /* Type of region (e.g., country, economic union) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "gdp" REAL /* GDP of the region */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the region's geographical center */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the region's geographical center */,
  "climate_zone" TEXT /* Climate zone of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the energy source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of energy source (e.g., renewable, non-renewable) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the energy source */,
  "renewable_status" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the source is renewable */,
  "emission_factor" REAL /* Average CO2 emission factor of the energy source */,
  "cost_per_kwh" REAL /* Average cost per kilowatt-hour of energy produced */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_data" (
  "production_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production data point */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the energy source */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of production */,
  "production" REAL /* Amount of energy produced */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of energy production */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("production_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_data_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES energy_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "consumption_data" (
  "consumption_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each consumption data point */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the energy source */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of consumption */,
  "consumption" REAL /* Amount of energy consumed */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of energy consumption */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("consumption_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_consumption_data_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_consumption_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_consumption_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES energy_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cagr_data" (
  "cagr_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each CAGR data point */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the energy source */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Start year of the time period */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* End year of the time period */,
  "cagr" REAL /* CAGR value */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cagr_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cagr_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES energy_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cagr_data_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cagr_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast data point */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the energy source */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the forecast */,
  "production_forecast" REAL /* Forecasted energy production */,
  "consumption_forecast" REAL /* Forecasted energy consumption */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of energy production and consumption */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecasts_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecasts_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES energy_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecasts_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, policymaker) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data accessed */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data accessed */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user generating the report */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data used in the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the generated report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user generating the visualization */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data used in the visualization */,
  "visualization_name" TEXT /* Name of the visualization */,
  "visualization_date" TEXT /* Date when the visualization was generated */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the generated visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., government, international organization) */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data source for reference */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the data source was last updated */,
  "reliability_score" INTEGER /* Score indicating the reliability of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_imports" (
  "import_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data import */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "import_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was imported */,
  "data_file" TEXT /* File path to the imported data file */,
  "import_status" TEXT /* Status of the data import */,
  "import_log" TEXT /* Log of the import process for troubleshooting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("import_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_imports_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)
